name: Central Park
description: Central Park is a place to play pickleball in Tappahannock, VA. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.
hours: Mon. - Fri. 8:30 am- 4:30pm Office Phone : (804) 445-0303 E-mail : kcarlton@essexva.gov Contact Us Essex County Parks and Recreation 112 Cross Street P.O. name: Essex Intermediate School
description: Come play pickleball at Essex Intermediate School in Tappahannock, VA! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.
